beer.beer_name: The Cool Kids - Mexican Spicy Hazy IPA
beer.beer_description: A new style in the making, this hot Mexican hazy IPA greets you with sweet lime, tropical flavours, hot chilli notes and a touch of salt.

items.checkin_comment: Smells like lime, chilli and fruit. It’s a strange mix of a regular hazy and chilli, but it’s a good level of spicy.

items.badge_description: You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay. That's 270 different beers with the style of IPA - New England / Hazy, Pale Ale - New England / Hazy, IPA - Milkshake, or Pale Ale - Milkshake. Try 5 more for Level 55!

items.badge_description: Thanks for staying at home, and checking in with Untappd! It allows us to stay connected to a community of beer lovers, just like you, even if we can't be in the same physical location. From our home to yours, cheers and stay safe!

While spontaneity can be fun, sometimes you want to make sure your adventure will rock. Checkout the menu at an Untappd Verified Venue before visiting and know exactly what’s on tap! That's 30 check-ins at venue that is verified. Try 5 more for Level 7!

Canning is all the rage and it's not hard to see why - travels well, more environmentally friendly, and no need to carry your bottle opener. That's 30 checkins with the serving style of Can. Try 5 more for Level 7! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

items.badge_description: Looking for more kick than a session beer, but want to be able to stay for a few rounds? You have to keep it in the middle. That's 325 beers with an ABV greater than 5% and less than 10%.  Try 5 more for Level 66!

items.checkin_comment: Has a fun brett umami flavour even though there's probably no brett in it. Lots of fun, would swill again.

user.bio: Inner West brewery enthusiast and bon vivant. Currently favouring boozy grapefruity IIPAs.

user.bio: Music connoisseur (ambient, tribal, drone and deep space), plus some craft beer (mostly IPA related styles)...

items.checkin_comment: Kind of nice, kind of like eating a candle or drinking cleaning product. A pleasant very mild heat.

items.badge_description:
The beer style with the most annual check-ins definitely deserves its own party, don’t you think?

In 2023, Sierra Nevada had the brilliant idea to create a day of celebration for hazies, and we gotta tip our cap to their brilliant idea! 

This year, we’re excited to introduce our second iteration of the Hazy IPA Day badge.
